Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We have 5 cases 2001 to 2005 We need to identify cases with performance issues and analyze attributes Resource Region Complexity to find root causes

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: First compute the total duration for each case from the first event Submit Claim to the last event Close Claim

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2001 Total duration from 0900 to 1030 on same day 15 hours

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2002 Total duration from 0905 on Apr 1 to 1100 on Apr 2 total 25h55m

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2003 Total duration from 0910 on Apr 1 to 0930 on Apr 3 total 48h20m

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2004 Total duration from 0920 to 1045 on same day 1h25m

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2005 Total duration from 0925 on Apr 1 to 1430 on Apr 4 total 77h5m

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: So durations 2001 15h 2002 2592h 2003 4833h 2004 142h 2005 7708h Clearly cases 2003 and 2005 are much longer Case 2002 is also longer than 2001 and 2004

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: High complexity seems to correlate with long durations But also note that in case 2002 there is one request for additional documents and that might be the cause

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 2001 Low short 2002 Medium long 2003 High very long 2004 Low short 2005 High very long

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Region alone not cause because 2001 is short and 2003 is long in Region A and Region B has both short and long cases

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Low complexity cases have no Request Additional Documents Medium has one request High has multiple requests

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The number of requests correlates with duration 0 requests short 1 request medium 2 requests long 3 requests very long

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus the root cause is that high complexity claims require multiple rounds of additional documents which extend the process

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Maybe region B high complexity took longer because the adjuster in region B Lisa handled more requests or had more workload but we do not have enough data to confirm

Name: Validation - PE
Text: By complexity Low average about 146h Medium 2592h High average about 627h so complexity is a strong predictor

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Cases 2002 2003 and 2005 have performance issues compared with cases 2001 and 2004 which finish in about 15 hours

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: High complexity claims often involve more intricate details and missing information which increases the likelihood of repeated requests for clarification and documents

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: To mitigate improve initial claim documentation use better checklists for high complexity claims streamline the request process and assign experienced staff to complex cases
